boundaries.name: verification_finding
boundaries.meaning: Independent assessment of evidence against declared criteria.

boundaries.name: governance_disposition
boundaries.meaning: Separate authenticated decision by an applicable authority over an exact subject and evidence set.

boundaries.name: proof_sealing
boundaries.meaning: Separate authenticated exact-evidence event establishing a sealed proof state.

boundaries.name: restore
boundaries.meaning: Execution of a bounded reconstruction or re-establishment action.

boundaries.name: verify_restore
boundaries.meaning: Independent verification that the restored subject satisfies declared restore criteria.

boundaries.name: authorize_cutover
boundaries.meaning: Separate governance authorization to transition an exact verified restore candidate into the target operating state.

boundaries.name: cut_over
boundaries.meaning: Execution of the authorized transition into the target operating state.

boundaries.name: release
boundaries.meaning: Separate lifecycle disposition making an exact artifact set an authorized release candidate or release.

boundaries.name: deployment
boundaries.meaning: Separate authorization and execution path for placing an exact release into an exact environment.
